title: Actions++
description: in this mod-pack (Actions++) it adds stuff like the way you hold your items, 3d items, player animations and mob animations, but the thing that Minecraft misses the most is particles, in this mod-pack it also adds particles like water   particles and fire.
body:
in this mod-pack (Actions++) it adds every thing you need to make it _feel_ like better minecraft
